message:
fix: resolve cache timer orphan, skipped fetch, degraded backend, SSE partial cache, and SSE dedup issues (#5407)

- Clear auto-refresh timer and reset initial-fetch guard when cache key
  changes, preventing orphaned timers from polling stale keys (#5399) and
  ensuring new keys trigger an immediate fetch (#5400)

- Treat any successful /health HTTP response as backend-up regardless of
  status field value, so a "degraded" backend (all clusters unreachable)
  no longer flips the app into demo mode (#5401)

- Mark SSE timeout and stream-ended-without-done paths as aborted so
  partial/incomplete results are not stored in the 10s result cache (#5402)

- Track per-cluster item counts in SSE accumulator and replace stale
  entries on reconnect retries to prevent duplicate rows (#5403)

Closes #5399
Closes #5400
Closes #5401
Closes #5402
Closes #5403

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
